description: Deeply nested conditional logic with high cyclomatic complexity and poor readability

input.diff:
diff --git a/src/processor.py b/src/processor.py
index 0000000..d4e5f6a 100644
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/processor.py
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+def process_order(order, user, inventory, config):
+    if order is not None:
+        if user is not None:
+            if user.is_active:
+                if order.total > 0:
+                    if inventory.check(order.items):
+                        if config.get('payments_enabled'):
+                            if user.balance >= order.total:
+                                if not order.is_duplicate():
+                                    if order.validate_items():
+                                        result = order.charge(user)
+                                        if result.success:
+                                            inventory.reserve(order.items)
+                                            return {'status': 'ok'}
+                                        else:
+                                            return {'status': 'charge_failed'}
+                                    else:
+                                        return {'status': 'invalid_items'}
+                                else:
+                                    return {'status': 'duplicate'}
+                            else:
+                                return {'status': 'insufficient_funds'}
+                        else:
+                            return {'status': 'payments_disabled'}
+                    else:
+                        return {'status': 'out_of_stock'}
+                else:
+                    return {'status': 'invalid_total'}
+            else:
+                return {'status': 'inactive_user'}
